cases.given: A live bounded-admin tuple and routed ingress starter
cases.expected: The case opens only with source domain, source decision, and source lineage refs present.

cases.given: A routed ingress case still inside the governed window
cases.expected: The case may reclassify only to a canonical subtype declared in the profile.

cases.given: A routed ingress case after the governed reclassification window
cases.expected: Continuity evaluation returns frozen posture with routed window elapsed reason.

cases.given: The boundary no longer proves bounded admin-only meaning
cases.expected: Further admin mutations fail and later tasks must reopen or re-enter clinician review.
